languages.text: {n}Волоски на вашем теле встают дыбом. По нервам пробегает зудящая, нестерпимо горячая волна напряжения, и каждая мышца скручивается в острейшем спазме. Мощный импульс энергии отшвыривает вас назад.{/n}

{n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Волоски на вашем теле встают дыбом. По нервам пробегает зудящая, нестерпимо горячая волна напряжения, и каждая мышца скручивается в острейшем спазме. Мощный импульс энергии отшвыривает вас назад.{/n}

{n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dir stehen sämtliche Haare zu Berge. Eine unerträglich heiße Spannungswelle durchzuckt deine Nerven und lässt jeden einzelnen deiner Muskeln verkrampfen. Ein mächtiger Impuls aus Energie schleudert dich zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dir stehen sämtliche Haare zu Berge. Eine unerträglich heiße Spannungswelle durchzuckt deine Nerven und lässt jeden einzelnen deiner Muskeln verkrampfen. Ein mächtiger Impuls aus Energie schleudert dich zurück.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tous vos poils se hérissent d'un coup. Une vague d'électricité à la chaleur insoutenable fourmille dans tout votre corps, et vos muscles se tendent dans un spasme violent. Une puissante vague d'énergie vous projette en arrière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tous vos poils se hérissent d'un coup. Une vague d'électricité à la chaleur insoutenable fourmille dans tout votre corps, et vos muscles se tendent dans un spasme violent. Une puissante vague d'énergie vous projette en arrière.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你全身寒毛倒竖。一股炽热而刺痛的电流沿神经狂涌，每一块肌肉都在剧烈痉挛。强烈的能量脉冲将你猛然震退。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你全身寒毛倒竖。一股炽热而刺痛的电流沿神经狂涌，每一块肌肉都在剧烈痉挛。强烈的能量脉冲将你猛然震退。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los pelos de tu cuerpo se erizan. Una onda electrizante e insoportablemente caliente recorre tus nervios, retorciendo tus músculos en un doloroso espasmo. Un poderoso pulso de energía te lanza hacia atrás.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hairs on your body stand on end. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of voltage rushes through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of energy propels you backward.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los pelos de tu cuerpo se erizan. Una onda electrizante e insoportablemente caliente recorre tus nervios, retorciendo tus músculos en un doloroso espasmo. Un poderoso pulso de energía te lanza hacia atrás.{/n}

languages.text: {n}体中の毛が逆立つ。ピリピリと耐え難いほど熱い緊張の波が神経を駆け巡り、すべての筋肉が鋭く痙攣する。強力な推進力のパルスがあなたを数メートル後退させる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The hairs on your body stand up. A tingling, unbearably hot wave of tension surges through your nerves, and every muscle twists in a sharp spasm. A powerful pulse of Propulsion Force throws you back a few metres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vücudundaki tüyler diken diken oluyor. Karıncalanan, dayanılmaz derecede sıcak bir voltaj dalgası sinirlerinden geçiyor. Her kas, keskin bir spazmla bükülüyor. Güçlü bir enerji darbesi seni geriye fırlatıyor.{/n}
